raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2416 strengthens the Safer from Wildfires program to expand community-wide wildfire prevention measures.",
    "Mitigating wildfire risk in California is a huge priority.",
    "Incentivizing home and business owners to invest in home hardening measures will help communities reach higher levels of fire safety.",
    "Home hardening measures will reduce catastrophic losses of life and property.",
    "The California Department of Insurance 'Safer from Wildfires' regulations seek to incentivize wildfire mitigation efforts by offering insurance discounts.",
    "Homeowners can receive insurance discounts if they demonstrate specific wildfire prevention and hardening measures.",
    "California residents are finding homeowners’ insurance in high-risk fire areas increasingly difficult and costly to obtain.",
    "AB 2416 will provide cost-effective wildfire prevention efforts for homeowners and communities.",
    "AB 2416 incentivizes insurers to provide insurance coverage for homes and businesses in California.",
    "Effective home and community hardening measures help contain the spread of wildfires.",
    "Home and community hardening measures reduce property damage and save lives.",
    "Reducing claims liability for insurers is a benefit of effective wildfire prevention measures."
  ]
}
```
